mapper.update: MERGE INTO product_join_progress t USING (SELECT #{userNo} AS user_no, #{productNo} AS product_no FROM dual) s ON (t.user_no = s.user_no AND t.product_no = s.product_no AND t.progress_status = 'IN_PROGRESS') WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.current_step = #{currentStep}, t.verification_no = #{verificationNo}, t.required_terms_codes = #{requiredTermsCodes}, t.optional_terms_codes = #{optionalTermsCodes}, t.rate_no = #{rateNo}, t.currency_code = #{currencyCode}, t.amount = #{amount}, t.period_month = #{periodMonth}, t.applied_rate = #{appliedRate}, t.updated_dt = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( join_progress_no, user_no, product_no, verification_no, current_step, progress_status, required_terms_codes, optional_terms_codes, rate_no, currency_code, amount, period_month, applied_rate, created_dt, expired_dt ) VALUES ( seq_product_join_progress.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, #{productNo}, #{verificationNo}, #{currentStep}, 'IN_PROGRESS', #{requiredTermsCodes}, #{optionalTermsCodes}, #{rateNo}, #{currencyCode}, #{amount}, #{periodMonth}, #{appliedRate}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE + 7 )

UPDATE product_join_progress SET current_step = #{currentStep}, verification_no = #{verificationNo}, required_terms_codes = #{requiredTermsCodes}, optional_terms_codes = #{optionalTermsCodes}, rate_no = #{rateNo}, currency_code = #{currencyCode}, amount = #{amount}, period_month = #{periodMonth}, applied_rate = #{appliedRate}, updated_dt = SYSDATE WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND product_no = #{productNo} AND progress_status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM product_join_progress WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND product_no = #{productNo} AND progress_status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND (expired_dt IS NULL OR expired_dt > SYSDATE) ORDER BY join_progress_no DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
